content: PostHog default us.posthog.com host is blocked by most ad blockers; set up a reverse proxy under your own domain via Next.js rewrites (next.config) or middleware. Do NOT use obvious proxy paths like /analytics /tracking /posthog — blockers catch them; use a unique path. Reverse proxy adds Vercel bandwidth/function cost. PWA service worker can cache/intercept these requests — must exclude the proxy path and posthog assets from SW caching.
